positive: A whimsical, highly stylized silhouette of a sleeping fox curled around a basket of glowing mushrooms and celestial flowers. The scene should evoke deep forest magic and tranquility. Use bold, clean linework and a limited, contrasting color palette of deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and bioluminescent golds against a cream background. Composition must be centered, clean, and highly scalable for apparel printing. Focus on strong, graphic contrast, perfect for screen printing effect. Minimalist, enchanting, vintage nature illustration style. Studio shot, ultra-detailed, high contrast, vector art quality.
